raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find with -mtime 30? Modified exactly 30 days ago? Use -mtime 30 means modified between 30 and 31 days? For exactly 30 days ago use -mtime 30 -daystart? Actually -mtime 30 matches files modified between 30 and 31 days ago. For exactly 30 days ago maybe use -mtime 30 -daystart? But requirement likely find files modified 30 days ago. Use find /workspace -type f -mtime 30.
